testcase.name: Upload UI - Clear All Button Functionality › clear all button removes all uploaded files from the queue
Upload UI - Clear All Button Functionality › clear all button works with mixed success and error files
Upload UI - Clear All Button Functionality › clear all button appears only when files are uploaded
Upload UI - Clear All Button Functionality › clear all button works after multiple operations
Upload UI - Clear All Button Functionality › clear all button does not affect data persistence in other parts of app
